name: Basware Invoice Automation API
what_it_does: Basware REST API for purchase-to-pay automation platform. Enables AI agents to process invoices, retrieve payment status, manage purchase orders, track procurement workflows, and integrate Basware invoice data into ERP and finance systems. Basware is a leader in AP automation and e-invoicing, especially in European enterprises.
use_cases: Retrieving invoice processing status from AP automation monitoring agents
Submitting purchase orders and tracking approval status from procurement agents
Accessing payment data and remittance information from finance reporting agents
Integrating Basware invoice data into SAP and Oracle ERP workflow agents
best_when: A large enterprise using Basware for P2P automation wants AI agents to monitor invoice processing, track payment status, and integrate AP data into ERP and finance reporting.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Invoice processing and payment data errors cause real financial impact. PRIVACY: Vendor financial data is commercially sensitive.

auth.notes: Basware API uses OAuth 2.0. Enterprise access required. Contact Basware for API partner access. Documentation is private for enterprise customers.

pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise P2P platform with module-based pricing
pricing.notes: Finnish company, enterprise-focused. Strong European market presence. Pricing based on invoice volume and modules.

performance.rate_limits: Enterprise rate limits; not publicly documented

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Invoice and payment data errors cause real AP impact
No public MCP server — enterprise OAuth2 API access required
Finnish company with EU-native design — strong GDPR and EU e-invoicing standard support
API documentation private — enterprise customers only
Basware supports Peppol e-invoicing network — consider for EU compliant invoice exchange
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Invoice and vendor payment data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. EU-native company. EU-first data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: Invoice and vendor financial data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. EU-native. Peppol support.
